retrieved_result: ULZ file extension A ulz file extension is related to the USBlyzer, a USB protocol analysis software. A ulz file contains captured data from USBlyzer. There is one other file type using the ULZ file extension!.ulz - Windows Updates Downloader update list Detailed description Software that works with ulz file extension
Decision_Reason: The result concerns ULZ file extensions and USB analysis software, not Docker or container setup for beginners.
